content.problemStatement:
Chef recently discovered a function XOR()XOR()XOR(), which computes the XOR of all elements of a sequence:
XOR(a1..n)=a1⊕a2⊕⋯⊕an .XOR(a_{1..n}) = a_1 \oplus a_2 \oplus \dots \oplus a_n\,.XOR(a1..n​)=a1​⊕a2​⊕⋯⊕an​.

Chef has a sequence AAA with size NNN. He generated a new sequence BBB with size N2N^2N2 using the following formula:
BiN+j+1=(Ai+1+Aj+1)∀  0≤i,j<N .B_{iN+j+1} = (A_{i+1} + A_{j+1}) \quad \forall\; 0 \le i, j \lt N\,.BiN+j+1​=(Ai+1​+Aj+1​)∀0≤i,j<N.

Compute the value of XOR(B)XOR(B)XOR(B).
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of two lines: the first line contains an integer N, the size of array A. The second line contains N space‑separated integers A1, A2, …, AN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the XOR of all N² elements of sequence B, where B_{i·N+j+1}=A_{i+1}+A_{j+1}.

sampleTestCases.explanation: XOR of A is 1⊕2=3. Shifting left by one gives 6, which equals the XOR of all four elements of B.
XOR of A is 1⊕2⊕3=0. Shifting left yields 0, matching the XOR of the nine sums.
XOR of A is 5. The only element of B is 5+5=10, which equals 5 shifted left by one.

solution.approach: The XOR of all pairwise sums B_{i·N+j+1}=A_i+A_j can be simplified using properties of XOR. For any bit position, the contribution of that bit in the sum appears an even number of times unless the total count of elements N is odd. It can be shown that the overall XOR of B equals (XOR of all A) shifted left by one (i.e., multiplied by 2). Therefore, for each test case we only need to compute the XOR of the original array A and then output (xorA << 1). This runs in O(N) time per test case and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, O(total N) over all test cases.

code.Java: import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();int T=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());while(T-- >0){int N=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());long xr=0;for(int i=0;i<N;i++){long v=Long.parseLong(st.nextToken());xr ^= v;}sb.append((xr<<1)).append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
